description: Revel in the comfort of pure leather and look stylish in ease in this pair of sandals from enroute. Pair it with western wear and sarees and look great both ways.This pair comes with a shoe bag to help you carry it around in ease.UpperLeather straps criss-crossing over the midfoot and forefoot with a toe separator, and a buckled crossover ankle strap to lock the foot in placeA high backfoot patch for better support to the footNubuck lining below the straps for comfort Padded leather footbed for all-day comfortOutsoleDurable rubber outsole grooved on the forefoot and heel for absolute grip and tractionSandal careWipe surface with a dry, clean cloth to remove dust and dirtUse a branded leather conditioner for the straps if necessaryDo not store in direct sunlight
